name: Customer
description: An individual or organization that has purchased or may purchase goods from Lumina Retail Co.

name: Loyalty Member
description: A Customer enrolled in the Lumina Rewards program and assigned a unique loyalty number (LUM-########).

name: Loyalty Number
description: A unique identifier assigned to a Loyalty Member. Format: LUM- followed by 8 digits.

name: Personally Identifiable Information
description: Any data that can identify a specific individual (name, email, phone, national ID, date of birth).

name: National ID
description: A government-issued identifier for a Customer. Highly sensitive PII subject to access restrictions.

name: Payment Card
description: A credit or debit card number used to pay for an Order. In scope for PCI-DSS controls.

name: Marketing Consent
description: A Customer's recorded opt-in or opt-out decision for marketing communications under GDPR/CCPA.

name: Order
description: A confirmed purchase transaction placed by a Customer for one or more Products.

name: Order ID
description: A unique identifier for an Order. Format: ORD- followed by 10 digits.

name: Product
description: A sellable item in the Lumina catalog identified by a SKU.

name: SKU
description: Stock Keeping Unit. A unique product identifier. Format: SKU-AAA-##### (3 letters + 5 digits).

name: Product Category
description: A grouping of Products by type (e.g., Apparel, Electronics) used for merchandising and reporting.

name: Sensitive Data
description: Data requiring elevated protection due to privacy, regulatory, or contractual obligations.

name: Total Amount
description: The monetary value of an Order line: unit_price multiplied by quantity.
